hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"command\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -q "git commit" && echo "$CMD" | grep -qi "co-authored-by"; then echo "BLOCKED: Co-Authored-By trailer is forbidden per CONTRIBUTING.md. Remove it and retry."; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q "\.g4$"; then echo "REMINDER: After editing .g4 grammar, run: bash src/query/parser/cypher/generate.sh"; fi'

bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"file_path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q "\.g4$"; then echo "REMINDER: After editing .g4 grammar, run: bash src/query/parser/cypher/generate.sh"; fi'
